title: General Resource Pack
description:
A General Resource Pack that adds some nice subtle textures to the game
JADE
body:
# [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I2I61APAYX)
This Resource Pack adds in some very general and nice textures to MC
Featuring a Darker GUI to make it easier on the eyes.
JADE Color Accents added; like the hotbar selected changes color.
New block breaking animation. Box from in to out.
You are missing out by not using this amazing resource pack.
Try it now!
